response.step_by_step_log: The video shows a virtual character talking, followed by a musical performance of "Gunjo Sanka" (群青讃歌) by Eve. I searched for "群青讃歌 Eve Japanese and English lyrics" and found several reliable sources to populate the lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a virtual idol performance. The segment focuses on an announcement followed by a live performance of the song "Gunjo Sanka" (群青讃歌) by Eve.

scenes.description: A virtual idol is talking and making announcements to the audience.
The virtual idols start performing the song "Gunjo Sanka" (群青讃歌). Text "群青讃歌" and "作詞・作曲 Eve" appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
繋がっていたいと信じられる言葉だって
もう昨日の僕らにおさらば
青い春を過ごした 遠い稲妻
泣いて、それから夜を明かして
きっとどんなに楽になれただろう
この心を揺らした 生きる望みは
無いものねだりは やめた
未完成人間 素晴らしい、世界だけが
答えを握っている
諦めてしまうほどに この先たくさんの
後悔が待ち構えているけどもうない
迷いはしないよ この傷も愛おしくて
消えてしまいそうだ
重なって、重なって
このまま、このままでいいから 走れ
その歩幅で 走れ
この事、任せて
鳥が飛ぶ、同じくらい、抱きしめて
静かに、今を、繋いで
儚くて、消えてしまう未来
それでも生身の、どうしようもない僕らが
立って一つ塔を鳴らす
いたずら、奇跡みたい、切ない
あっと言う間に流れる時が
ありのままで あり続ける
失った怖さ、取り戻せない時間を
過去を振り返ってばかりじゃ
泣いたっていいんだ 悔しさも
痛みだけが
君を肯定するから
大人になったら 忘れてしまう
君との約束した場所は
もうない 覚えていて
思い出も愛おしく思えてしまうほど
重なって消えてしまうよ 重なって消えてしまうよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's a connection, it's a belief, it's a word that can be trusted
Even yesterday's us have said goodbye
Spending the blue spring, in the distant lightning
Weeping, and only then turning towards the end
Certainly, how easily could we have become comfortable?
This heart, shaken, the longing to live
Nothingness, we have stopped
The imperfect human, wonderful, the only world
Holding the answer in our hands
Giving up, more than that, this is too much
Regret is waiting for me, but it's no longer here
I won't get lost, this wound is also beloved
I feel like it will disappear
Overlapping, it will overlap
As it is, just as it is, it's fine, run
In that stride, run
This, leave it to me
A bird flying, the same amount, embrace me
Quietly, now, connect it
A future that is fleeting and then disappears
Still, it's also a raw, unavoidable us
Standing together, a single tower ringing out
A prank, like a miracle, a sad,
In the blink of an eye, the time that flows
The way it is, to continue to be
The fear that is lost, the time that cannot be taken back
Looking back at the past, it's not enough
Just regrets, and only the pain
Because I will affirm you,
If I were an adult, I would forget
The place where I made a promise with you
It's no longer there, remember it
Even the memories, I feel like they are beloved
It will overlap and disappear, it will overlap, it will disappear
